# Royal Clean Kaduna

> Kaduna's 24/7 professional cleaning and fumigation service. House cleaning, deep cleaning, office cleaning, sofa cleaning, and licensed pest control across Kaduna metropolis.

Royal Clean Kaduna is a premium cleaning and fumigation provider serving homes, offices, short-lets, and industrial facilities across Kaduna State, Nigeria. Vetted, uniformed crews. Eco-friendly products. Same-day availability. Royal Guarantee — spotless or we re-clean free.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of cleaning and fumigation services in Kaduna.
- [About](/about): Company story, values, and the Royal Guarantee.
- [Our team](/our-team): The people behind Royal Clean Kaduna.
- [How it works](/how-it-works): 4-step booking process from quote to clean.
- [Pricing](/pricing): Transparent pricing for all cleaning packages.
- [Service areas](/service-areas): Neighborhoods we serve across Kaduna.
- [Contact](/contact): Phone, WhatsApp, email, and quote form.
- [FAQ](/faq): Answers about scheduling, products, and guarantees.

## Services

- [House cleaning](/house-cleaning-kaduna): Recurring and one-off home cleaning.
- [Deep cleaning](/deep-cleaning-kaduna): Top-to-bottom seasonal deep cleans.
- [Office cleaning](/office-cleaning-kaduna): Janitorial contracts for offices, banks, clinics.
- [Sofa & upholstery cleaning](/sofa-upholstery-cleaning-kaduna): Steam extraction for sofas and mattresses.
- [Carpet cleaning](/carpet-cleaning-kaduna): Deep extraction for rugs and carpets.
- [Window cleaning](/window-cleaning-kaduna): Streak-free interior and exterior glass.
- [Move in / move out cleaning](/move-in-move-out-cleaning-kaduna): Landlord-ready handovers.
- [Post-construction cleaning](/post-construction-cleaning-kaduna): New build and renovation cleanup.
- [Airbnb / short-let cleaning](/airbnb-short-let-cleaning-kaduna): Same-day turnover cleaning.
- [Event cleaning](/event-cleaning-kaduna): Pre, mid, and post-event crews.
- [Industrial cleaning](/industrial-cleaning-kaduna): Factory and warehouse cleaning.
- [Disinfection & sanitization](/disinfection-sanitization-kaduna): Hospital-grade disinfection.
- [Fumigation service](/fumigation-service-kaduna): Licensed pest treatment.
- [Pest control](/pest-control-kaduna): Rodents, ants, termites and more.
- [Cockroach treatment](/cockroach-treatment-kaduna): Gel baits and IGRs.
- [Bed bug treatment](/bed-bug-treatment-kaduna): Heat and chemical treatment.
- [Mosquito control](/mosquito-control-kaduna): Indoor and outdoor mosquito control.
